MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JIMMY YANG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED. Having considered supplemental briefing on the matter, Plaintiff properly executed substitute service at Defendant's usual place of business under Code of Civil Procedure section 415.20 subdivision (a).
